# Story: Confirmation modal for destructive actions

## User Story

As a user, I want a confirmation modal with a clear button before any destructive
action so I do not lose work by accident.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1: Given a delete action, when triggered, then a modal appears with a
  Cancel button and a Confirm button.
